patterns.header-slot-precedence: The card header can be created two ways: (1) using the header slot for custom content, or (2) using headerTitle and headerSubtitle props for automatic rendering. The header slot takes precedence and will completely replace any headerTitle/headerSubtitle props. When using props, set withHeader=true to render the header section.
patterns.header-actions-slot: The header-actions slot is independent of the main header slot and always renders in the top-right corner of the header when provided. It works with both custom header slot content and prop-based headers.
patterns.variant-combinations: Card variants can be combined: elevated adds shadow elevation, interactive adds hover effects and pointer cursor, and primary adds a 6px top border in the theme primary color. Multiple variants can be applied simultaneously (e.g., elevated + interactive + primary).
patterns.slot-structure: The card uses three slots: header (optional), default (card body, always in card__body), and footer (optional, only when Astro.slots.has('footer')).

guidelines.when-to-use: Use Card for grouped content with optional header and footer. Use elevated for emphasis, interactive for clickable cards, primary for highlighted top border.
guidelines.composition: Compose with header slot or headerTitle/headerSubtitle; use footer slot for actions or secondary content.

events.name: click
events.description: When interactive=true, card is clickable; handle click on the root element or use as link wrapper

state.description: No internal state; interactive prop adds hover styling and pointer cursor.
